scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.kill-ports: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');[5000,3000,5173].forEach(p=>{try{const r=execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :'+p+' | findstr LISTENING',{encoding:'utf8'});r.split('\n').forEach(l=>{const pid=l.trim().split(/\s+/).pop();if(pid&&pid!=='0')try{execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+pid,{stdio:'ignore'})}catch{}});console.log('Killed port '+p)}catch{console.log('Port '+p+' free')}})"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix admin install
